name: ALGONQUIN POWER + UTILIT.
summary: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. is a diversified generation, transmission, and distribution utility with approximately $17 billion of total assets. Through its two business groups, the Regulated Services Group and the Renewable Energy Group, Algonquin Power delivers clean, renewable energy and regulated natural gas, water, and electricity utility services to over one million customer connections. The company is headquartered in Oakville, Ontario, Canada.
